query:
SELECT
            g.name as "name!",
            COUNT(a.id) as "song_count!",
            0 as "album_count!",
            0 as "artist_count!",
            0 as "total_duration!"
           FROM genrez g
           LEFT JOIN albumz a ON a.genre_id = g.id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL
           GROUP BY g.id, g.name
           ORDER BY g.name ASC
